message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantPadding 20
skinparam boxPadding 10

actor "Program" as P
participant "V4L2" as V4L2
participant "Bridge CX3" as CX3
participant "Camera OV5640" as CAM

== Initialization ==
P -> V4L2: 1 OpenDevice(/dev/video0)
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 2
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 3
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 4
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 5
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 6
deactivate V4L2

P -> V4L2: 7 InitDevice()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 8
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 9
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 10
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 11
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 12
deactivate V4L2

== Test ==
P -> V4L2: 13 SetParameter(valueA)
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 14 valueA
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 15 valueA
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 16
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 17
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 18
deactivate V4L2

P -> V4L2: 19 GetParameter()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 20
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 21
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 22 value
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 23 value
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 24 value
deactivate V4L2
note left of P: value must be equal to ValueA

P -> V4L2: 25 StartStream()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 26
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 27
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 28
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 29
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 30
deactivate V4L2

P -> V4L2: 31 GetParameter()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 32
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 33
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 34 value
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 35 value
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 36 value
deactivate V4L2
note left of P: value must be equal to ValueA

P -> V4L2: 37 SetParameter(valueB)
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 38 valueB
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 39 valueB
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 40
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 41
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 42
deactivate V4L2

P -> V4L2: 43 GetParameter()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 44
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 45
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 46 value
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 47 value
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 48 value
deactivate V4L2
note left of P: value must be equal to ValueB

P -> V4L2: 49 StopStream()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 50
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 51
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 52
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 53
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 54
deactivate V4L2

P -> V4L2: 55 GetParameter()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 56
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 57
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 58 value
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 59 value
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 60 value
deactivate V4L2
note left of P: value must be equal to ValueB

== Destruction ==
P -> V4L2: 61 CloseDevice()
activate V4L2
V4L2 -> CX3: 62
activate CX3
CX3 -> CAM: 63
activate CAM
CAM --> CX3: 64
deactivate CAM
CX3 --> V4L2: 65
deactivate CX3
V4L2 --> P: 66
deactivate V4L2

destroy P
destroy V4L2
destroy CX3
destroy CAM
@enduml
```
